---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

Load the XLSX file

```{r}
### load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
### read and clean the demographic data

raw_demog_xls <- read_xlsx(
  "./data/i1_raw_data.xlsx",
  na = c("", "N/A"),
  sheet = "DEMO")

demog_xls <- raw_demog_xls |>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  # only use time information from trial_time column 
  mutate(trial_time = hms::as_hms(trial_time)) |>
  # combine date and time columns as single datetime and drop original cols
  mutate(trial_datetime = trial_date + trial_time) |>
  select(-c("trial_date", "trial_time")) |>
  # move numeric cols to the front
  select(all_of(c("participant", "age", "height")), everything()) |>
  # convert most cols to factors
  mutate(across(-("participant":"height" | "notes"), as.factor)) |>
  glimpse()
```
```{r}
### read and clean the car error data

raw_exp_xls <- read_xlsx(
  "./data/i1_raw_data.xlsx",
  sheet = "EXP")

exp_xls <- raw_exp_xls |>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  glimpse()
```

```{r}
### read and clean the car time data

col_names = c(
  "participant",
  "phase",
  "event",
  "start_time",
  "duration",
  "note"
)

raw_times_csv <- read_csv("./data/i1_times.csv", col_names=col_names)

times_csv <- raw_times_csv |>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  separate(event, into = c("event", "number"), sep = " ") |>
  mutate(
    event = as.factor(tolower(event)),
    number = as.numeric(number)
  ) |>
  glimpse()
```

```{r}
car_data <- exp_xls |>
  filter(is.na(flag), participant == 1001, phase == 1) |>
  inner_join(
    times_csv |>
      filter(event == "car"),
    by = c("participant", "phase", "car" = "number")
    ) |>
  glimpse()
```


```{r}
### play with plots (EDA)

library(gtExtras)

exp_xls |>
  filter(phase == 1) |>
  gt_plt_summary()
```
